title: Boat Rental in St Petersburg: Costs, Routes & Tips for 2026
html:
Exploring St Petersburg from the water offers a unique perspective on its grand palaces and canals. The city's Neva River and Gulf of Finland provide varied boating opportunities, with half-day motorboat rentals starting from around 250 EUR. BoatHire24 lists verified vessels for every experience level.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in St Petersburg?

A shared sightseeing tour costs from 50 EUR per person, while a private motorboat starts at 250 EUR for three hours. Prices vary by vessel size, season, and included crew. Expect to pay 1500-3000 EUR for a full-day crewed luxury yacht. Always check fuel policies and docking fees.

For a clear overview of options, browse boat hire St Petersburg listings on BoatHire24, which include transparent pricing and owner reviews.

Where to set off in St Petersburg

The main departure points are concentrated along the Neva River and near the Gulf of Finland. Real marinas and harbours include:

  • Neva Yacht Club (Petrovskaya Embankment), central and well serviced.
  • Yacht Club Terra (Krestovsky Island), popular for motorboats.
  • Sea Facade Passenger Port (Vasilyevsky Island), large modern marina.
  • Lakhta Yacht Club (near the Lakhta Center), convenient for the Gulf.
  • Repino Bay, a scenic spot on the Gulf of Finland, 40 km northwest.
  • Peterhof Pier, ideal for combining palace visits with a boat trip.

Which boat to rent

Choosing the right boat depends on your group size and itinerary. Here are popular options available through BoatHire24:

  1. Axopar 28 Open, a versatile day cruiser for up to 8 guests, excellent for exploring the Neva and Gulf; from 350 EUR half-day.
  2. Fairline Phantom 40, a comfortable motor yacht for 6-8 guests, ideal for island hopping to Kronstadt; from 700 EUR half-day. Check the Fairline listing for current availability on BoatHire24.
  3. Lagoon 42, a spacious catamaran for 8-10 guests, perfect for relaxed day charters on the Gulf; from 900 EUR half-day.
  4. Riva Aquariva, a stylish speedboat for 4-6 guests, turning heads along the canals; from 500 EUR half-day.

Costs and price ranges for St Petersburg boat rental

Understanding the cost breakdown helps you budget accurately.

  • Shared tour (1-2 hours): 50-70 EUR per person, typically on a large motorboat with guide.
  • Small motorboat (half-day): 250-400 EUR for boats up to 6 guests, including basic navigation.
  • Catamaran (full-day): 1200-2000 EUR for up to 12 guests, often with a skipper.
  • Luxury crewed yacht (full-day): 2500-5000 EUR for a premium experience with professional crew.

Prices vary with season; high summer (June to August) commands a premium. Always confirm whether VAT and fuel are included.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in St Petersburg?

For small motorboats and sailing yachts, foreign visitors generally need an International Certificate of Competence (ICC) or equivalent. Some private boats may be rented without a licence if a skipper is included. The Russian authorities recognise ICCs issued by most European countries. Always confirm the exact requirements with the operator, because rules can change and enforcement varies. BoatHire24 listings state the licence prerequisites clearly.

Local tip: In July, the afternoon breeze known as the "petrovsky" picks up on the Gulf of Finland, making for excellent sailing conditions between 14:00 and 18:00. Plan your trip to anchor at the Kronstadt fort islands.

At a glance

  • Price band: 50-5000 EUR per person or charter
  • Peak months: June to August (high season)
  • Trip length: 1 hour to full day (8+ hours)
  • Maximum guests: Usually 8-12 on standard charters
  • Currency: EUR (some operators accept Russian roubles at market rate)

Questions about boat rental in St Petersburg

Can I rent a boat without a skipper?

Yes, you can hire a bareboat if you hold an ICC and the operator’s insurance covers your licence.

What is the best time of day for a boat trip?

Late afternoon and evening during the White Nights period (June) offer long daylight and stunning sunsets.

How far is Kronstadt from St Petersburg city centre?

Kronstadt island lies roughly 30 nautical miles west of the Neva Yacht Club, about 1-1.5 hours by motorboat.

Are pets allowed on charter boats?

Policies differ; many operators allow well-behaved dogs, but check the specific listing on BoatHire24 before booking.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in St Petersburg or list your own. Whether you are planning a canal cruise or a Gulf excursion, the platform connects you with verified owners and seamless bookings. BoatHire24 makes it easy to find the perfect vessel for your 2026 adventure.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in St Petersburg and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
